text:
Market today: The market mood is cautious, with Schwab strategists warning the era of easy index gains is over. This directly impacts your tech/chip heavy, index-exposed book. AI remains a focus, but with political angles.

Your holdings: SOXL (-31.31%, SELL) and SPAL (-24.25%, NEW) need immediate attention; both are leveraged ETFs, amplifying losses and decay. QQQI (-1.9%, TRIM) also signals a need to reduce exposure. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on your SMH holding, as the scanner shows a WATCH setup in a daily discount, suggesting potential value if market sentiment improves.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk in your leveraged, losing positions and be selective with new entries amidst broader market warnings.
plays: Address SOXL's "SELL" status and -31.31% loss; consider reducing exposure to this leveraged ETF given its decay and your margin usage.
Review SPAL, a new leveraged position down -24.25%. Decide on your risk tolerance, possibly cutting losses or setting a tighter stop.
Trim QQQI as signaled, respecting the 52 stop to manage your income anchor position.
